message.content:
Explore the collabspace project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace to understand:

1. How documents are currently managed - look at the collabspace-server for document-related entities, controllers, services (search for "document", "doc", "file", "node" related code)
2. Whether there's any existing tag/label/category system already in place (search for "tag", "label", "category", "标签", "分类")
3. The database migration setup (Liquibase) - where changelogs live
4. The frontend structure for document management in collabspace-web
5. Look at the database schema for any document/node related tables

Be thorough - check both collabspace-server and collabspace-web directories. Report file paths, key class names, and any existing patterns that would be relevant to adding a document tagging feature.
